subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God! Thy detailed letter was received, wherein thou didst supplicate God to preserve thee from stumbling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله نامه مفصل شما رسید بخدا تضرع و دعا نموده بودی که ترا حفظ از لغزش
subcodes.subjects: @silence; fewness of words, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
